name: Wam Global Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 13% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.1800, stop A$2.0988, target A$2.4079 (2.81:1) — then trail it.
